calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-27-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR:Brenda Fields.
Appearances:
Carolyn Morris, Esq. for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N. A.
After hearing the evidence and declaration presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. and against the defendants Crystal Perkins and Olivia Geter.
Principal of $27,248.21
Interest of $2,871.47
Attorney's fees of $2,000.00
Costs of $354.50
For the total of $32,474.18
Judgment signed in open court.
